title: Baker Hughes Company (BKR) Stock Analysis: Tickeron Identifies Bullish Broadening Wedge Ascending Pattern
author: tickeron_community
selftext: As of May 14, 2025, Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ: [BKR](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BKR/)), a leading player in the industrial services and oilfield equipment sector, is drawing attention from traders and investors due to a promising technical pattern identified by [Tickeron’s AI Pattern Search Engine.](https://tickeron.com/stock-pattern-screener/?utm_source=TickerOn&utm_campaign=TopMenu) With a current stock price of $37.85, a market capitalization of $33.5 billion, and a recent dip of $0.33 (-0.86%), BKR is showcasing a Broadening Wedge Ascending pattern, signaling potential bullish momentum.
